nasb.text: They cried for help, but there was none to save, Even to the Lord, but He did not answer them.

esv.text: They cried for help, but there was none to save; they cried to the Lord, but he did not answer them.

cnv.text: 他們呼叫，卻沒有人拯救； 就算向耶和華呼求，他也不答應他們。

ccb.text: 他们高声求救，却无人搭救； 他们呼求耶和华，祂也不应允。

csbs.text: 他们呼救，却没有人拯救； 他们向耶和华呼救，他也不回应。
